body_txt: Related to but distinct from Rubber Man ; while a rubber man is able to mold and shape their whole body without much care for physics, someone with extendable limbs is limited by the limbs they're able to stretch, and still abide by the physiology of their species. For example, a man made of rubber might flatten and enlarge his hands to flip someone like a pancake, while someone with extending arms can only stretch them to grab at or punch something. Also common with robots. Compare Prehensile Hair and Creepily Long Arms . If you are looking for the Toon Physics joke, see Elongating Arm Gag .
